title: AgentEvent
description: Streamed output event consumed by every channel (instructions.md §7.4, §8.3). Each carries a monotonic per-conversation `seq` for gap-free WebSocket replay.

data.description: Shape depends on `type`. Examples: tool.call → {tool, args_summary, requires_approval}; cron.created → {job_id, human_schedule, next_run_at}; escalated → {from, to}; done → {usage, cost_usd}; error → {code (taxonomy §21), message}.
